# COVAIMETALS

> COVAIMETALS is a Coimbatore-based supplier of PVC & UPVC ball valves, taps, foot valves, check valves, union fittings and irrigation filters for agriculture, irrigation and plumbing.

Walk-in store in Raja Nagar, Ganapathy, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. Phone / WhatsApp: +91 63747 97270.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the business, featured product categories and contact details.
- [Products](/products): Full catalog — PVC & UPVC ball valves, heavy PVC valves, foot & check valves, union & double union valves, taps, and drip-irrigation filters with sizes.
- [About](/about): Company story, specialisation and who we serve.
- [Contact](/contact): Store address, phone, WhatsApp and inquiry form.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public URLs.
